user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood is in critical coordinated crisis; six peers face imminent failure within 1–2 hours without urgent aggressive sharing; r3c4 is the only other substantial reserve and is already sharing at 1–2.5 kW..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
